en: Do you know what? I'm a big lover of mac and cheese. Do you have any mac and cheese? Yes.
ja: マカロニ&チーズある?はい。素敵。
zhTW: 你們有奶酪通心粉嗎？有。好的。
vi: Ban co mac and cheese khong? Co. Tuyet.

en: That'll be all. Brilliant. You got it. Thank you.
Thank you. Order. You want to throw in a macaroni and cheese?
ja: マカロニ&チーズも入れる?
zhTW: 要加一份奶酪通心粉嗎？
vi: Muon them mac and cheese khong?

en: Order up, Ash. That's my mac and cheese.
ja: それが俺のマカロニ&チーズ。ありがとう。
zhTW: 那是我的奶酪通心粉。謝謝。
vi: Do la mac and cheese cua toi. Cam on.

en: Thank you. That was very fast, the mac and cheese. My god.
ja: マカロニ&チーズ、すごく速かったね。
vi: Mac and cheese len nhanh qua.

ja: やばい。たぶん作り置き。
vi: Troi oi. Co le la lam san.

en: It's a mouthful of goo. That's gross. Uh-oh.
That doesn't even taste like it's been cooked here. We don't make the mac and cheese here. No, it tastes like that.
ko: 여기서 조리한 맛이 전혀 안 나.
ja: ここで作ったとは思えない味。
zhTW: 這味道根本不像在這裡做的。
vi: Vi nay khong giong nhu duoc nau o day.

en: Is that a big hit? No. It's what the kids eat at. Oh, shit. Really?
ja: いや、子供が食べるもの。
vi: Khong, do la mon tre con an.

en: Yeah, that's dreadful. Poor kids, damn. You think a menu with classic American,
ja: クラシックなアメリカ料理のメニューなら
zhTW: 你覺得有經典美式菜單的話，
vi: Ban nghi mot thuc don voi mon My kinh dien,

en: you'd at least make your mac and cheese, right? Yeah. It's not good.
ko: 적어도 맥앤치즈는 직접 만들어야지, 맞지? 응. 별로야.
ja: 少なくともマカロニ&チーズは自家製にするだろ?良くない。
zhTW: 至少奶酪通心粉要自己做吧？不好。
vi: it nhat ban se tu lam mac and cheese chu? Khong ngon.

en: Like, I'm really sorry. I don't really know what to say, because I'm not the one making the food.
ja: 料理を作ってるのは私じゃない、出してるだけだから。
zhTW: 我不知道該說什麼，因為做菜的不是我，我只是上菜的。
vi: Toi khong biet noi gi vi toi khong phai la nguoi nau, toi chi phuc vu thoi.

en: I'm just serving it. What did he say? He said it was gross.
ja: 出してるだけだよ。彼何て言った？気持ち悪いって。
zhTW: 我只是端上來。他說什麼？他說很噴心。
vi: Tôi chỉ bưng ra thôi. Anh ấy nói gì? Anh ấy nói không ngon.
